
file-vs-nbd run 2026-06-07T22:41:40Z
data_file=.tmp/file-vs-nbd/bench.dat
nbd_device=/dev/nbd2
loop_device=/dev/loop0
size_mb=1024 random_ops=16384 io_depths=1,4,16 direct=false drop_caches=true targets=file,loop,nbd
